absorption: Significant selling pressure, evidenced by the large negative delta candle (-289), is being absorbed by passive buyers at the vPOC level (61214.1), preventing further price decline.
dom_observation: Aggressive market sells (38 lots at 61220, 43 lots at 61200) are hitting the bids, but the price is holding firm around the vPOC, indicating strong bid-side absorption.
reasoning: Aggressive sellers are failing to break the vPOC support due to strong passive buyer absorption, creating a high-probability long reversal setup.
